current_todos.notes: tasks.md is 156KB with 26 DONE tasks, each having extremely long descriptions (multi-paragraph). Auto-archiving only moves VERIFIED tasks, but tester verifies ~1/cycle while ~1 new task is created/cycle, so DONE backlog stays at 26. File will keep growing. Options: (1) wait for tester to catch up, (2) consider if task descriptions can be shorter, (3) monitor if size causes agent performance issues. Observing for now.
